overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red jacket walking through a neon-lit urban street at night. The character navigates a narrow sidewalk beside a large concrete building, stops at a curb to wait for traffic, and crosses the street with another pedestrian.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk between concrete building and multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beside a large concrete building, passing other pedestrians

entered.detail: tall gray concrete wall with horizontal panel lines running the length of the sidewalk
large illuminated pink billboard with partial text visible
yellow utility van parked along the street curb
tall buildings covered with glowing digital billboards and neon signage
overhead street illumination with orange glow

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow urban sidewalk at night, flanked by a massive concrete building wall on the right and a busy neon-lit street on the left. Parked vehicles and digital billboards line the opposite side of the street as the character moves forward through the sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner waiting area with crosswalk

events.description: character stops at the curb to wait for passing traffic before crossing
pedestrian in gray jacket approaches and waits beside ego character at the curb

agents.ego_description: standing at the street curb waiting for a gap in traffic to cross safely

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray jacket approaches and stands beside ego, also waiting to cross

entered.detail: blue street sign with white text reading 'Ford' mounted on a pole
white painted lines on the asphalt indicating pedestrian crossing zone

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a street corner next to a crosswalk, waiting for vehicles to pass. Another pedestrian joins the wait beside them. The concrete building wall remains on the right while traffic flows past on the left, illuminated by neon signs and street lights.

events.description: character begins crossing the street alongside the other waiting pedestrian
character reaches the opposite sidewalk with graffiti-covered walls and yellow curb

agents.ego_description: walking across the street alongside another pedestrian, moving from the concrete building side to the graffiti-covered side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray jacket crossing the street in parallel with ego character

entered.detail: dark wall covered with colorful graffiti and street art on the opposite side of the street
painted yellow curb marking the corner of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide street with the other pedestrian, moving through the crosswalk as sparse traffic passes by. They reach the opposite side where the environment features graffiti-covered walls and a yellow-painted curb, transitioning away from the concrete building corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from a narrow sidewalk into an open street crossing. It begins with the character walking along a massive concrete building wall, flanked by digital billboards and parked vehicles under the glow of city lights. As the character reaches a street corner, the forward motion pauses to wait beside another pedestrian while traffic flows past in a blur of neon. The scene then shifts as the character steps into the crosswalk, moving away from the concrete wall and across the wide street. Finally, the camera follows them to the opposite side, where the environment opens up to reveal graffiti-covered walls and a yellow-painted curb.
